examples: Another project recently released by Dassault / SolidWorks is n!Fuze.
Box.net has partnered with Fuze meeting to add real-time online meetings and screen sharing.
Fuze automatically includes all related files to help prevent broken assemblies or missing parts.
And since Fuze Meeting is in the cloud, there is no need to have IT consultants, servers and other investments.
BodyArmor was created in June 2011 by Lance Collins, who created FUZE Beverage and NOS Energy Drink (sold to the Coca-Cola Company in 2007).
